name: Rahul Verma
summary: 5 years in corporate finance and M&A advisory at leading Indian professional services firms. No legal background.

experience.title: Finance Manager
bullets: Led financial due diligence for 8 M&A transactions across pharma and tech sectors
Prepared valuation models for assets totalling ₹1,200Cr
Managed client relationships across 4 active engagements simultaneously

experience.title: Financial Analyst
bullets: Built DCF and comparable company models for equity research coverage
Contributed to 3 IPO pitchbooks generating ₹400Cr in mandates

achievements: Promoted to Finance Manager in 18 months vs typical 30
